name: test_ssh_key_secret
description:
Check that the charm behaves correct regarding the ssh_key Juju secret.

    Note that this test does not attempt to utilize the SSH key as the passed key is not expected to be
    authorized anywhere.
descriptionHtml:
Check that the charm behaves correct regarding the ssh_key Juju secret.

Note that this test does not attempt to utilize the SSH key as the passed key is not expected to be
authorized anywhere.
